profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.text: I've been working in web development for over 8 years, across projects ranging from legacy system modernization to serverless architectures. Working with a wide range of technologies throughout my career has given me the confidence to tackle unfamiliar challenges — whether it's a new stack, a new tool, or a problem I haven't faced before. I enjoy being involved in architectural decisions, understanding the business context, and contributing beyond my role.

list.position: Full Stack Developer — Blink Media Inc.

list: Built a serverless application with React and Firebase to automate display ad management.
Integrated Gemini via Vertex AI for text translation and focal-point detection in images.
Maintained and fixed bugs in the company's ERP, developed in CakePHP.

list.position: Web Developer — Colegio de Escribanos de la Provincia de Buenos Aires (Notary Public Association)

list: Developed applications and web services within a microservices ecosystem.
Built RESTful APIs with Spring Boot, using Kong as an API Gateway and Vue.js for SPAs.
Node.js services for WebSocket communication and PDF generation.
Maintenance of existing Spring and JSF applications.
Definition and maintenance of CI/CD pipelines with GitLab and Jenkins.

list.position: Web Developer — Dirección Provincial de Sistemas de Información y Tecnologías (Buenos Aires Province Government)

list: Technical lead on the team, setting technical guidelines and mentoring junior developers.
Modernization of legacy applications (PHP 5.3) and development of new ones using Symfony and Vue.js.
Exposed SOAP web services as REST APIs using the Slim Framework.
